titleStmt.title: SII 29.72: original edition by P. N. Narasimha Murthy
No. 72. (A.R. No. B. 543 of 1961-62.) BALLAṬGI, MANVI TALUK, RAICHUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: Slab set up in the Desai tōṭa.

It states that during the reign of Chālukya Tribhuvanamalla, his queen Chandaladēvi made several grants viz., a land of 12 mattar extent, a flower garden of 1(0) mattar extent, a house site and an oil mill to the god Kalidēva for the worship, for the priest and for burning of perpetual lamp. It mentions Mānuve and god Dhōrapēśvara also.

It is dated in Chāḷukya Vikrama year 40. Manmatha, Pushya, śu. 1 Vaḍḍavara, uttarāyaṇa sankrānti. It corresponds to 1115 A.D., December 18. But, there was no sankrānti on that day. uttarāyaṇa sankrānti occured on December 25, Saturday and the tithi was śu. 7 [f.d.t. 43]. Probably this is the actual date of the record.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti samasta bhuvanāśraya śrī pṛthvīvallabha mahārājādhirāja pa(ra)
mēśvara parama bhaṭṭārakaṁ satyāśraya kuḷatiḷakaṁ cāḷu
kyābharaṇaṁ śrīmatribhuvanamalladēvara vijayarājya muttarōttarā
bhivṛddhi pravardhamāna mācandrārkka tāraṁ saluttamire śrī svastyānavarata parama ka
lyāṇābhyudaya sahasraphaḷabhōga bhāgini dvitīyalakṣmī samāne
kaḷa haṁsayāne śrī ś®tāgāra vidyādhara sakaḷakaḷādhari kastūrikāmōde dāna vi
nōde śrīmatribhuvanamalla viśāḷa vakṣasthaḷa nivāsiniyarappa śrīmat
caṁdaladēviyaru śrīmaccāḷukya vikrama varṣada 40 neya manmatha saṁvatsa(rada)
puṣyaśuddha 1 vaḍḍavāradaṁduttarāyaṇa saṁkrāntiya parvanimittavāgi
śrīmat kalidēvara naivēdyavaṁgabhōgakkaṁ khaṇdasphuṭita jīrṇnōddhāra
kkaṁ mānuveya baṭṭeyiṁ baḍaga deseya dhōrapēśvara dēvara
ḍaga sarvvabādhā parihāravāgi biṭṭa kariya nela mmattar 12 hūvina tōṁṭaṁ
mattar 1 naṁdādīvigege gāṇa 1 pūjārige nivartana 1 (śrī) .
Digital edition of SII 29.72 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
